cd /Users/zcdeng/projects/yoCareer/tests/fixtures && python3 -c " for f in ['canary-cv.cn-broken-no-name.html', 'canary-cv.cn-broken-no-phone.html', 'canary-cv.cn-broken-header-after-body.html', 'canary-cv.cn-broken-fffd.html', 'canary-cv.cn-broken-box-chars.html']: s = open(f).read() print(f'{f}:') print(f' has 张伟: {\"张伟\" in s}') print(f' has +86-: {\"+86-\" in s}') print(f' fffd count: {s.count(chr(0xFFFD))}') print(f' box chars (■+□): {s.count(\"■\") + s.count(\"□\")}') # header order check h1_pos = s.find('

张伟

') body_pos = s.find('个人总结') print(f' h1 before body: {h1_pos < body_pos and h1_pos != -1}') "
